name: Grid
examplePrompt: A clean responsive grid of square thumbnails, grouped by collection, with even spacing and chunky borders.

name: Clothesline
examplePrompt: Horizontal scroll strips per collection, like prints clipped on a clothesline - peek and swipe sideways.

name: Desk
examplePrompt: A scattered desk layout - prints loosely piled on a flat surface with slight tilts and soft overlaps.

name: Directory
